message:
🌱 ollama: KV Cache Quantization (#1080)

* 🌱 Add ollama: KV Cache Quantization mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: update PR URL for ollama#5091 KV Cache Quantization

PR #5098 was WIP/closed without merge. PR #6279 (merged 2024-12-03)
is the actual fix for KV cache quantization support.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "ollama-5091-kv-cache-quantization",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "ollama: KV Cache Quantization",
+    "description": "KV Cache Quantization. Requested by 33+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current ollama setup",
+        "description": "Verify your ollama version and configuration:\n```bash\nollama --version\n```\nThis feature requires a working ollama installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review ollama configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant ollama configuration:\nIt would be good if the KV Key cache type could be set in Ollama.\n\nllama.cpp allows you to set the Key cache type which can improve memory usage as the KV store increases in size, especially when running models like Command-R(+) that don't have GQA."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for KV Cache Quantization",
+        "description": "WIP\n\nTesting adding configuration to allow setting the KV cache type re: #5091 \n\n---\n\n- Allow setting the KV cache type in the env and params.\n- Allow setting flashattention in params (as well as the existing env).\n```yaml\nllm_load_tensors: offloading 80 repeating layers to GPU\nllm_load_tensors: offloading non-repeating layers to GPU\nllm_load_tensors: offloaded 81/81 layers to GPU\nllm_load_tensors:        CPU buffer size =   631.12 MiB\nllm_load_tensors:      CUDA0 buffer size = 18582.29 MiB\nllm_load_tensors:      CUDA1 buffer size = 18650.40 MiB\nllama_new_context_with_model: n_ctx      = 8192\nllama_new_context_with_model: n_batch    = 1024\nllama_new_context_with_model: n_ubatch   = 512\nllama_new_context_with_model: flash_attn = 1\nllama_new_context_with_model: freq_base  = 1000000.0\nllama_new_context_with_model: \n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"KV Cache Quantization\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "WIP\n\nTesting adding configuration to allow setting the KV cache type re: #5091 \n\n---\n\n- Allow setting the KV cache type in the env and params.\n- Allow setting flashattention in params (as well as the existing env).",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "llm_load_tensors: offloading 80 repeating layers to GPU\nllm_load_tensors: offloading non-repeating layers to GPU\nllm_load_tensors: offloaded 81/81 layers to GPU\nllm_load_tensors:        CPU buffer size =   631.12 MiB\nllm_load_tensors:      CUDA0 buffer size = 18582.29 MiB\nllm_load_tensors:      CUDA1 buffer size = 18650.40 MiB\nllama_new_context_with_model: n_ctx      = 8192\nllama_new_context_with_model: n_batch    = 1024\nllama_new_context_with_model: n_ubatch   = 512\nllama_new_context_with_model: flash_attn = 1\nllama_new_context_with_model: freq_base  = 1000000.0\nllama_new_context_with_model: freq_scale = 1\nllama_kv_cache_init:      CUDA0 KV buffer size =   697.00 MiB\nllama_kv_cache_init:      CUDA1 KV buffer size =   663.00 MiB\nllama_new_context_with_model: KV self size  = 1360.00 MiB, K "
+      ]
+    }
+  },
